title: Hedysarum nonnae
taxonomy: Hedysarum nonnae is classified as a species within the genus Hedysarum, which is a part of the Fabaceae family of flowering plants. This classification reflects the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the broader plant kingdom. The genus Hedysarum includes approximately 200 species of plants, many of which are native to temperate and subtropical regions. Hedysarum nonnae is a specific example of a legume, a type of plant that fixes nitrogen from the atmosphere.
